SEARCH
Package com.example.getoutthere.repositories

Class EventRepositoryTest

java.lang.Object
com.example.getoutthere.repositories.EventRepositoryTest
public class EventRepositoryTest extends Object
Unit tests for EventRepository. These tests verify that events are created, retrieved, and updated correctly through the repository.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    EventRepositoryTest()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    createEvent_withoutPoster_savesEventSuccessfully()
    Verifies that createEvent assigns an ID, default waitlist count, default QR code content, and saves the event successfully when no poster image is provided.
    void
    getEventById_existingEvent_returnsEvent()
    Verifies that getEventById returns the event when the Firestore document exists.
    void
    getEventById_missingEvent_callsFailure()
    Verifies that getEventById returns an error when the event document does not exist.
    private <T> void
    mockTaskFailure(com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<T> task, Exception exception)
    Mocks a failed Firebase task and immediately triggers its failure listener.
    private <T> void
    mockTaskSuccess(com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<T> task, T result)
    Mocks a successful Firebase task and immediately triggers its success listener.
    void
    updateEvent_withoutPoster_updatesSuccessfully()
    Verifies that updateEvent saves the updated event successfully when no new poster image is provided.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • EventRepositoryTest

      public EventRepositoryTest()

  • Method Details

    • createEvent_withoutPoster_savesEventSuccessfully

      public void createEvent_withoutPoster_savesEventSuccessfully()
      Verifies that createEvent assigns an ID, default waitlist count, default QR code content, and saves the event successfully when no poster image is provided.

    • getEventById_existingEvent_returnsEvent

      public void getEventById_existingEvent_returnsEvent()
      Verifies that getEventById returns the event when the Firestore document exists.

    • getEventById_missingEvent_callsFailure

      public void getEventById_missingEvent_callsFailure()
      Verifies that getEventById returns an error when the event document does not exist.

    • updateEvent_withoutPoster_updatesSuccessfully

      public void updateEvent_withoutPoster_updatesSuccessfully()
      Verifies that updateEvent saves the updated event successfully when no new poster image is provided.

    • mockTaskSuccess

      private <T> void mockTaskSuccess(com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<T> task, T result)
      Mocks a successful Firebase task and immediately triggers its success listener.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the task result type
      Parameters:
      task - the mocked task
      result - the result returned to the success listener

    • mockTaskFailure

      private <T> void mockTaskFailure(com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<T> task, Exception exception)
      Mocks a failed Firebase task and immediately triggers its failure listener.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the task result type
      Parameters:
      task - the mocked task
      exception - the exception returned to the failure listener
